sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50499" key="i(meroi/nda" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμερο-ίνδα</orth>, adverbial termin. of words signifying a game or sport, mostly with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παίζειν</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.110</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">164</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
